module_info.docstring:
Tests for the persistent window-based agent identity system (bd-1tz).

Covers:
- Window identity creation on first registration with MCP_AGENT_MAIL_WINDOW_ID
- Window identity reuse on subsequent registrations
- Priority chain: explicit name > window identity > auto-generate
- Window identity lifecycle (list, rename, expire)
- Edge cases: invalid UUID, multiple agents same window, no env var

functions.name: test_window_id_created_on_first_registration
functions.docstring: A new UUID in MCP_AGENT_MAIL_WINDOW_ID should create a new window identity.

functions.name: test_window_id_reused_on_subsequent_registration
functions.docstring: Same UUID should return the same display_name on re-registration.

functions.name: test_window_id_without_env_var
functions.docstring: Without MCP_AGENT_MAIL_WINDOW_ID, behavior should be unchanged (no window fields).

functions.name: test_window_id_invalid_format
functions.docstring: Non-UUID value for MCP_AGENT_MAIL_WINDOW_ID should fall back to auto-generate.

functions.name: test_explicit_name_takes_priority_over_window
functions.docstring: Priority 1: Explicit name should override window identity.

functions.name: test_window_display_name_unique_per_project
functions.docstring: Different windows in the same project should get different names.

functions.name: test_list_window_identities
functions.docstring: list_window_identities should return active window identities.

functions.name: test_rename_window
functions.docstring: rename_window should update the display name.

functions.name: test_expire_window
functions.docstring: expire_window should mark the identity as expired.

functions.name: test_multiple_agents_same_window
functions.docstring: Multiple agents registered with the same window UUID should share identity.

functions.name: test_window_persistence_across_sessions
functions.docstring: Window identity should persist across separate client sessions.
